title: parse_sapling_address ignores ZcashNetwork: mainnet addr accepted for testnet wallet
description: build_shielded_tx receives network: ZcashNetwork but passes it only to consensus_params, not to parse_sapling_address(). parse_sapling_address SaplingExtractor discards the _net parameter. A mainnet zs1... address supplied to a testnet wallet build_shielded_tx call will parse successfully and produce a valid-looking PaymentAddress, but the tx will be invalid on testnet. Funds are effectively burned. This duplicates nie-kef6.86 but is now confirmed as still present in the current code. Trigger: caller passes mainnet address string with ZcashNetwork::Testnet. Bad outcome: transaction built and broadcast but unspendable by recipient.
